DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL THIRD PARTY THOMAS O'NEILL TO PRODUCE BUSINESS RECORDS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THOMAS O'NEILL IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE RECORDS SOUGHT BY THE SUBPOENA WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE FAILURE TO PRODUCE THE RECORDS WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE IMPOSED AGAINST THOMAS O'NEILL IN THE AMOUNT OF $821.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
